rules.name: Production SKU required
rules.description: Resources using Basic, Free, or Developer SKUs do not include production SLA guarantees.
rules.rationale: Low-tier SKUs reduce availability guarantees for production workloads.
rules.remediationGuidance: Upgrade to Standard or Premium SKU for production services.

rules.name: Container Registry: Disable Admin User
rules.description: ACR admin user should be disabled.
rules.rationale: Admin user credentials are broad and harder to govern than RBAC identities.
rules.remediationGuidance: Disable ACR admin user and use managed identities/service principals with scoped roles.
